+++ b/views/upload.py
@@ -12,10 +12,7 @@
 def upload_file(request):
     f = request.FILES['file']
-    name = os.path.basename(f.name)
-    if not name.endswith(('.jpg','.png','.gif')):
-        return HttpResponse(status=400)
     dest = os.path.join(UPLOAD_DIR, f.name)
     with open(dest, 'wb') as out:
         out.write(f.read())
file_context:
def upload_file(request):
    f = request.FILES['file']
    dest = os.path.join(UPLOAD_DIR, f.name)
    with open(dest, 'wb') as out:
        out.write(f.read())

gold_annotations.issue: Arbitrary file upload: type validation removed. Attacker can upload .php/.py shell.
Path traversal via f.name — user controls filename. Use secure_filename().
f.read() loads entire file into memory. DoS via large file upload.
